title: fix: handle Nova Reel input errors
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Reeling in the errors
gist.blurb: We've polished up how Nova Reel handles video generation requests. Expect clearer error messages, automatic image resizing, and support for videos up to 120 seconds long!
gist.summary: Improved error handling and input validation for the Nova Reel video model, including automatic reference image normalization and support for 120-second durations.
gist.impact: Users will now receive helpful 400 errors instead of generic 500s for invalid inputs, and can generate longer videos up to 120 seconds.
gist.visual_concept: Nova Reel is a video generation model, so film reels and projectors are the perfect metaphor. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together to smoothly thread a film reel represents the improved error handling and smoother input pipeline.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, helping a chunky monitor robot thread a glowing film reel into a retro projector. The robot's screen shows a happy face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, helping a chunky monitor robot thread a glowing film reel into a retro projector.
